subject: Application for DevOps Engineer Fresher
message:
Hello Sir/Madam,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to express my interest in any available fresher positions at your esteemed organization.

Please find my resume attached for your review. I would be grateful for the opportunity to discuss how my skills and enthusiasm can contribute to your team.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
Sundhar K
